exists heat_groups cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists pricing_rule_groups cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists pricing_rule cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists registration cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists route cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series_entry_placements cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series_entry_results cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series_gyms cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series_leaderboard_entry cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists series_registration cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists submission cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists submitted_route cascade Hibernate: drop sequence if exists gym_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists submitted_route_seq Hibernate: create sequence gym_seq start with 1 increment by 50 Hibernate: create sequence submitted_route_seq start with 1 increment by 50 Hibernate: create table climber ( active boolean not null, created_at date not null, dob date, id bigint generated by default as identity, apartment_number varchar(255), city varchar(255), email varchar(255), emergency_name varchar(255) not null, emergency_phone varchar(255) not null, gender varchar(255) check (gender in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY','PASS')), name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255), phone varchar(255), series varchar(255), state varchar(255), street_address varchar(255), username varchar(255), zip_code varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table competition ( flat_fee integer, deadline timestamp(6), gym_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, series_id bigint, start_date timestamp(6), comp_format varchar(255) check (comp_format in ('CLASSIC_REDPOINT','MODIFIED_REDPOINT','JUDGED','OTHER')), comp_status varchar(255) check (comp_status in ('UPCOMING','LIVE','FINISHED')), fee_currency varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, pricing_type varchar(255) not null check (pricing_type in ('FLAT','BY_AGE','BY_GROUP')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table competition_selected_groups ( competition_id bigint not null, custom_group_id bigint, default_key varchar(255) check (default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')) ) Hibernate: create table competition_types ( competition_id bigint not null, types varchar(255) check (types in ('BOULDERING','SPORT_CLIMBING','SPEED_CLIMBING')) ) Hibernate: create table competitor_group ( age_rule_max integer, age_rule_min integer, constrained boolean, deleted boolean not null, deleted_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id bigint generated by default as identity, owner_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, age_rule_type varchar(255) check (age_rule_type in ('AGE','BIRTHYEAR')), name varchar(255) not null, owner_type varchar(255) not null check (owner_type in ('GYM','SERIES')), primary key (id), constraint uk_group_owner_name unique (owner_type, owner_id, name) ) Hibernate: create table dependent_guardians ( dependent_id bigint not null, guardian_id bigint not null, primary key (dependent_id, guardian_id) ) Hibernate: create table gym ( active boolean not null, created_at date not null, id bigint not null, apartment_number varchar(255), city varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255) not null, state varchar(255), street_address varchar(255), username varchar(255) not null unique, zip_code varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table heat ( capacity integer not null, divisions_enabled boolean not null, duration integer not null, competition_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, start_time timestamp(6), heat_name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table heat_divisions ( heat_id bigint not null, divisions varchar(255) check (divisions in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY')) ) Hibernate: create table heat_groups ( custom_group_id bigint, heat_id bigint not null, default_key varchar(255) check (default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')) ) Hibernate: create table pricing_rule_groups ( group_custom_id bigint, pricing_rule_id bigint not null, group_default_key varchar(255) check (group_default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), group_type varchar(255) check (group_type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')) ) Hibernate: create table pricing_rule ( amount integer not null, max_age integer, min_age integer, priority integer not null, competition_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255), rule_type varchar(255) not null check (rule_type in ('AGE','GROUP')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table registration ( feeamount integer not null, paid boolean not null, climber_id bigint not null, competition_id bigint not null, competitor_group_custom_id bigint, heat_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, checkout_session_id varchar(255), competitor_group_default_key varchar(255) check (competitor_group_default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), competitor_group_type varchar(255) not null check (competitor_group_type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')), division varchar(255) check (division in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY')), fee_currency varchar(255) not null, payment_status varchar(255) check (payment_status in ('PENDING','PAID','FAILED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table route ( number integer not null, point_value integer not null, competition_id bigint not null, gym_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, grade varchar(255) check (grade in ('UNGRADED','V0','V1','V2','V3','V4','V5','V6','V7','V8','V9','V10','V11','V12','V13','V14','V15','V16','V17')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table series ( active boolean not null, created_at date not null, end_date date, start_date date, deadline timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, description varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, series_status varchar(255) check (series_status in ('UPCOMING','LIVE','FINISHED')), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table series_entry_placements ( placement_counts integer, entry_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table series_entry_results ( placement integer, series_points integer, competition_id bigint, entry_id bigint not null, series_id bigint ) Hibernate: create table series_gyms ( gym_id bigint not null, series_id bigint not null, primary key (gym_id, series_id) ) Hibernate: create table series_leaderboard_entry ( rank integer, raw_climbing_points integer not null, total_attempts integer not null, total_series_points integer not null, climber_id bigint not null, competitor_group_custom_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, series_id bigint not null, competitor_group_default_key varchar(255) check (competitor_group_default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), competitor_group_type varchar(255) not null check (competitor_group_type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')), division varchar(255) check (division in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table series_registration ( climber_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, series_id bigint not null, division varchar(255) check (division in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table submission ( total_attempts integer not null, total_points integer not null, climber_id bigint not null, competition_id bigint not null, competitor_group_custom_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, registration_id bigint, competitor_group_default_key varchar(255) check (competitor_group_default_key in ('REC','INTERMEDIATE','ADVANCED','OPEN','YOUTH_D','YOUTH_C','YOUTH_B','YOUTH_A','JUNIOR')), competitor_group_type varchar(255) not null check (competitor_group_type in ('DEFAULT','CUSTOM')), division varchar(255) check (division in ('MALE','FEMALE','NONBINARY')), primary key (id), unique (competition_id, climber_id) ) Hibernate: create table submitted_route ( attempts integer not null, send boolean not null, id bigint not null, route_id bigint not null, submission_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_group_owner on competitor_group (owner_type, owner_id) Hibernate: alter table if exists competition add constraint FK4kxpy72iv4xqf7g8ii8924ctw foreign key (gym_id) references gym Hibernate: alter table if exists competition add constraint FKl654q0i0oqp4ov0xrjvaxhhcv foreign key (series_id) references series Hibernate: alter table if exists competition_selected_groups add constraint FKf7wg8d8gxwfak5elks6hi5hea foreign key (competition_id) references competition Hibernate: alter table if exists competition_types add constraint FKbxstox2l6og1lnk48ku5k9da1 foreign key (competition_id) references competition Hibernate: alter table if exists dependent_guardians add constraint FKep5gni2xdri4a9l25982c0vy3 foreign key (guardian_id) references climber Hibernate: alter table if exists dependent_guardians add constraint FK4988owqhlw2ap5oy23xg3k8yd foreign key (dependent_id) references climber Hibernate: alter table if exists heat add constraint FK4pcxg6yb2ju0paeu0j4cgvhwa foreign key (competition_id) references competition Hibernate: alter table if exists heat_divisions add constraint FK2u2rltjltm1dn4vw8xtgav745 foreign key (heat_id) references heat Hibernate: alter table if exists heat_groups add constraint FKphqbmpok6hdis4uif2fp58x5j foreign key (heat_id) references heat Hibernate: alter table if exists FKk8617bgk5m8o4cec0aq7b2bp5 foreign key (competition_id) references competition Hibernate: alter table if exists registration add constraint FK3ecp6c42dp15v11lx6bpgk23d foreign key (climber_id) 2026-06-07T14:52:22.454-06:00 INFO 2106497 --- [ Test worker] c.r.PricingRuleRepositoryIntegrationTest : Started PricingRuleRepositoryIntegrationTest in 3.927 seconds (process running for 7.983) Hibernate: select nextval('gym_seq') Hibernate: insert into gym (active, apartment_number, city, state, street_address, zip_code, created_at, email, name, password_hash, phone, username, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into competition (comp_format, comp_status, deadline, fee_currency, flat_fee, gym_id, name, pricing_type, series_id, start_date) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into pricing_rule (amount, competition_id, max_age, min_age, name, priority, rule_type) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into competition_types (competition_id, types) values (?, ?) Hibernate: insert into pricing_rule_groups (pricing_rule_id, group_custom_id, group_default_key, group_type) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into pricing_rule_groups (pricing_rule_id, group_custom_id, group_default_key, group_type) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.comp_format, c1_0.comp_status, c1_0.deadline, c1_0.fee_currency, c1_0.flat_fee, c1_0.gym_id, g1_0.id, g1_0.active, g1_0.apartment_number, g1_0.city, g1_0.state, g1_0.street_address, g1_0.zip_code, g1_0.created_at, g1_0.email, g1_0.name, g1_0.password_hash, g1_0.phone, g1_0.username, c1_0.name, c1_0.pricing_type, s1_0.id, s1_0.active, s1_0.created_at, s1_0.deadline, s1_0.description, s1_0.email, s1_0.end_date, s1_0.name, s1_0.password_hash, s1_0.series_status, s1_0.start_date, s1_0.username, c1_0.start_date, t1_0.competition_id, t1_0.types from competition c1_0 join gym g1_0 on g1_0.id=c1_0.gym_id left join series s1_0 on s1_0.id=c1_0.series_id left join competition_types t1_0 on c1_0.id=t1_0.competition_id where c1_0.id=? Hibernate: select pr1_0.competition_id, pr1_0.id, pr1_0.amount, pr1_0.max_age, pr1_0.min_age, pr1_0.name, pr1_0.priority, pr1_0.rule_type from pricing_rule pr1_0 where pr1_0.competition_id=? order by pr1_0.priority, pr1_0.id Hibernate: select g1_0.pricing_rule_id, g1_0.group_custom_id, g1_0.group_default_key, g1_0.group_type from pricing_rule_groups g1_0 where g1_0.pricing_rule_id=?
testsuite.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK.
